title: trachypogon capensis subvar. mollis
intro: Trachypogon capensis subvar. mollis, also known as the soft lemongrass, is a variant of the Trachypogon capensis plant, a type of grass native to Mexico and Central America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The soft lemongrass has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting digestion. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
